column1: # Domain 5 - Enterprise Active Directory Penetration Testing & Security Auditing
# Phase F - Safe Purple Team Validation
# every authorized Purple Team validation exercise. It provides traceability
# Rather than recording attack activity or telemetry
# administrative and governance information required to demonstrate assessment
# • One metadata record per validation exercise.
# • Validation_ID must reference an approved Purple Team exercise.
# • All evidence identifiers must match the Evidence Register.
# • Review and approval fields shall be completed before assessment closure.
# • Dates and timestamps should use ISO-8601 format.
# • Version history shall be maintained throughout the assessment lifecycle.
| **Assessment Information** | Identifies the validation exercise and its current lifecycle stage.                    |
| **Authorization & Scope**  | Demonstrates that testing was approved and conducted within scope.                     |
| **Version Control**        | Tracks document revisions and repository state over time.                              |
| **Knowledge Management**   | Preserves lessons learned and notes for continuous improvement.                        |
Phase F — Safe Purple Team Validation
